_comment: Provenance scanner exceptions. Maintained by Tony + Claude.

_format.suppressed: Individual findings to drop from the report entirely. Matched by file + content fingerprint (first 40 chars of string value). Line numbers drift -- fingerprints are stable.
_format.accepted_residuals: File-level or category-level findings to annotate in the report rather than suppress. Printed as a standing block at the top of PROVENANCE_AUDIT.md.

accepted_residuals.reason: Tier-2 V_STALE findings are multi-line string continuation false positives. Citations exist at entry-key level (# Source: above dict key). Verified correct by Gemini fact-check April 2026. Not real gaps.
Artemis II entries carry 'source': 'NASA/JSC' as a dict value. Scanner requires # Source: comment format. Verified correct. Future fix: extend SOURCE_PATTERNS to recognize dict-value citations.

accepted_residuals.name: unique_notes
accepted_residuals.reason: 553-entry stellar parameters dict. Verified against SIMBAD/Gaia DR3 April 2026. V_STALE flag reflects real staleness risk as catalogs improve. Review when adding new stars, not as standalone task.
All Tier-2 items have source citations (V=2). Score 10 = cited constant imported by 3+ modules. Not errors -- these are the best-cited values in the codebase.
Nucleus sizes and feature thresholds drive shell rendering geometry. Low user-visible impact if slightly off. Deferred until comet shell refactor.
